text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Happy holidays, Trainer. Here's a present for you
from Santa Claus. May it bring you plenty of joy.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Yes, though just for today. You see, I went to a
holiday party recently where I spoke with Oguri...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
So I hear your outfit was put together by some
friends of yours. Sounds like something my fans
would do. How wonderful...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Still, it's a shame that I'll only be wearing it
today. If only I had more opportunities...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's easy. Why don't you be our next
Santa?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And that's how I was chosen to play the part of
Santa for the academy's holiday event.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Now that I'm actually doing it, though, I feel a
little worried. I'm not sure whether everyone will
be happy to have me in the role.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: AH! I FOUND SANTA HAYAHIDEEE!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Figured you'd stand out dressed like that on
campus.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Indeed. But it does make for a perfect Santa. You've both done such a great job. Although if I did have any reservations...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide explains her concerns over
whether she'll be able to make the event suitably
fun.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: In that case, you could hype everyone up with impact! Like... Yeah! How about this? Hayahide, turn around!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I knew it! From behind, your hair looks just like
Santa's bushy beard! What if you run around
backwards while you hand out the presents?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: B-bushy beard?! My hair?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, it makes you look just like Santa! We could
call you "Backwards Santa"!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
What, and run up to people in reverse like a
horror movie? She'll scare them... She's the star of
the day, so she should just hand out presents
normally.
choice_data_list: Strive for impact and run around backwards!

Play the starring role and pass presents out
normally.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Running... backwards? With a... bushy beard? Ngh... I suppose that would make an impact. All right.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hoo! Haa! Happy holidaaaays!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Wha?! Was that Santa just now... running backwards?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Haa! Taa! Happy holidaaays!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
WHOA! Who the heck is that suspicious figure
running down the halls?! Don't tell me somebody's
snuck into the academy?!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Bakushin O! You saw that manic Santa sprinting
around backwards too?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I did! We have a suspicious intruder! This is super
exciting, isn't it?! ...Wait, no—it's not! It's a
CAMPUS CRISIS!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Right! It's time for a hero to save the day! I'll show
that creep who's boss! Hehehe!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
(Urk! Her eyes are positively gleaming! But I can't
let her catch me!)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
(I must play the role! If people find out that Santa
is actually me, their dreams will be crushed!)

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
What?! Dang it! I lost 'em! Grrr. There goes my
chance to perform some heroics!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Pant... Huff... (I got away! That was close, but I managed to fulfill my role as Santa Claus!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide continues passing the presents
out, and before long a huge crowd of students
has gathered around her.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: The "starring role," you say? That means I should approach the part with confidence, then.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Happy holidays! Now then, who here would like a
present?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Me! Me! Me! I wanna get a marvelous present! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa! I want a present too! ♪ Gimme
something for a grown-up, pleeease! ☆

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Huh, you're giving out presents?! Yay! Gimme all
of 'em! I want everything in that sack!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: What?! That's no fair! I want all of them too!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, only one each, okay? And don't forget, if
you're on the naughty list, you won't get
anything.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hm... So as long as we're good, we get a present?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That means... you might have one for me?! I'm
pretty sure I'm on the nice list!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oguri?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't expecting you to get this excited, hehe.
But of course, I have a present for you right here.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! I wonder what it could be. I hope it's
edible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide continues passing the presents
out, and before long a huge crowd of students
has gathered around her.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, there are plenty more presents to go
around. Just be patient, everyone.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Sorry I'm late. I was preparing special gifts for the
two of you. These ones come with letters.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, what does mine say? "As I begin to
transcribe my gratitude for you both, I find the
reasons to thank you are never-ending. The first
takes me back to the day we met..."

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It's so long. I'll read it when I get back to my
dorm. Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Of course. I just hope that today ends up being a
special day for you both. Happy holidays.
